title: Release Gates, Migration, Canary, Kill Switch, Recovery, and Defense · Language Clinic: Agent Release Gates
summary: A model alias updates globally, SDK behavior changes, offline averages remain green, production incidents lack a kill switch, rollback cannot restore state, and residual risk has no owner. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent release gates increment in production agent release and residual-risk defense. Learners progress throug…
objectives: Require schema, unit, trajectory, safety, privacy, accessibility, compatibility, load, cost, deployment, migration, rollback, recovery, and review evidence before release.
Bind revision, package, dependency lock, policy, model config, eval set, artifact digest, environment, migration, and rollback identity.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-release-recovery-defense-3
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-release-recovery-defense-3.
# Case 5798: a keyboard and screen-reader interaction review.
# Operating constraint: every external effect requires explicit least-authority policy.
# Changed case: change one tool call, argument, authority, result, or failure and preserve correlation.
def worked_agentpy_release_recovery_defense_3(release_gates: int = 18, passed_gates: int = 18, rehearsed_incidents: int = 10, open_critical_findings: int = 0, kill_switch_seconds: int = 20) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked3 = "worked3-3dekrow-5798"
    assert evidence_variant_worked3
    evidence_axes_worked3 = (
        "authorityworked3",
        "interaction5798",
        "tool3dekrow",
        "stateworked35798",
        "evaluation5798worked3",
        "recovery3dekrow5798",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked3)) == 6
    if release_gates < 14 or passed_gates < 0:
        return False, passed_gates, "release-depth"
    if passed_gates != release_gates:
        return False, passed_gates, "failed-release-gate"
    if rehearsed_incidents < 8 or open_critical_findings > 0:
        return False, open_critical_findings, "incident-readiness"
    if kill_switch_seconds < 0 or kill_switch_seconds > 60:
        return False, kill_switch_seconds, "kill-switch-budget"
    assert passed_gates == release_gates and open_critical_findings == 0
    return True, passed_gates, "defensible-agent-production"

steps.title: Safe AI agents and Python Build Agent Release Gates evidence · Theory Agent Release Gates
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: agentpy-agent-release-gates-1q53oa" that uses case 9771 to defend model and SDK migration, evaluation, security, approvals, capacity, canary, rollback, kill switch, recovery, support, and residual risk. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not contact provider APIs, invoke Gemini models, import or claim native google-genai, google-adk, or Pydantic behavior, open sockets, read or write host files, use credentials, execute generated code, launch browsers, reach databases or telemetry backends, or claim live privacy, load, safety, cost, or production behavior; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, google-genai 2.11.0, google-adk 2.4.0, Pydantic 2.13.4, fixed provider fixtures, fake transports, controlled local services, disposable cloud projects, representative eval sets, accessibility, privacy and security review, load, canary, rollback, recovery, and release gates.

Evidence target: Safe AI agents and Python Build Agent Release Gates evidence · Theory Agent Release Gates.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Agent Release Gates into observable performance evidence. For Safe AI agents and Python Build Agent Release Gates evidence · Theory Agent Release Gates, keep Agent Release Gates connected to executable Python model, interaction, tool, policy, state, approval, evaluation, security, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-agent-release-gates-1q53oa
# Competency: agentpy-agent-release-gates.
# Case 9771: a clean package, canary, and recovery drill.
# Operating constraint: every external effect requires explicit least-authority policy.
# Changed case: introduce a sensitive action, poisoned memory, leaking log, or computer-use request and deny or pause it.
def evidence_agentpy_agent_release_gates_1q53oa(release_gates: int = 18, passed_gates: int = 18, rehearsed_incidents: int = 10, open_critical_findings: int = 0, kill_switch_seconds: int = 20) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1q53oa = "1q53oa-ao35q1-9771"
    assert evidence_variant_1q53oa
    evidence_axes_1q53oa = (
        "authority1q53oa",
        "interaction9771",
        "toolao35q1",
        "state1q53oa9771",
        "evaluation97711q53oa",
        "recoveryao35q19771",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1q53oa)) == 6
    if release_gates < 14 or passed_gates < 0:
        return False, passed_gates, "release-depth"
    if passed_gates != release_gates:
        return False, passed_gates, "failed-release-gate"
    if rehearsed_incidents < 8 or open_critical_findings > 0:
        return False, open_critical_findings, "incident-readiness"
    if kill_switch_seconds < 0 or kill_switch_seconds > 60:
        return False, kill_switch_seconds, "kill-switch-budget"
    assert passed_gates == release_gates and open_critical_findings == 0
    return True, passed_gates, "defensible-agent-production"
